recommendations.Methane Accumulation: Check Main Mechanical Ventilator (MMV) water gauge; increase air quantity in the district.
recommendations.Roof/Strata Instability: Immediately implement Systematic Support Rules (SSR); check roof bolt torque.
recommendations.Ventilation Failure: Verify auxiliary fan positioning; ensure air velocity > 0.5 m/s at face.
recommendations.Respirable Dust: Enhance water infusion at the face; ensure dust extractors are operational.
recommendations.Water Inrush: Drill advance boreholes as per CMR 2017; verify barrier thickness.
recommendations.Machinery Accident: Enforce 'No-Go' zones; inspect audio-visual alarms (AVA) on HEMM.
